description: The InventoryManager app is failing to compile because the 'Item' data object is being passed via Intent but does not implement the Parcelable interface. Resolve this issue by implementing the 'android.os.Parcelable' interface for the 'Item' data class in 'app/src/main/java/com/example/inventory/model/Item.kt' using the 'kotlin-parcelize' plugin. The task is complete when the project builds successfully.
